message.content:
@startuml
participant Actor as Actor1
participant Actor as Actor2

interface UIConditionalFormattingCellExtension as UIConditionalFormattingCellExtension
interface UIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension as UIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension
interface ConditionalFormattingCellPanel as ConditionalFormattingCellPanel

Actor1 ..> UIConditionalFormattingCellExtension : starts use case
UIConditionalFormattingCellExtension ..> UIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension : create()
UIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension ..> ConditionalFormattingCellPanel : create()
ConditionalFormattingCellPanel ..> Actor1 : shows side bar

@enduml
